description.ru: Роли, bans, invitations, join requests и room policies.
description.en: Roles, bans, invitations, join requests and room policies.

rows.ru: Не воздействует на owner и не назначает moderators без permission
rows.en: Cannot act on owner or appoint moderators without permission
Subject to bans and room policies

text.ru: Скрытая кнопка не является защитой. Любая mutation повторно проверяет session, resource, membership, role, ban, policy, input и rate limit.
text.en: A hidden button is not a security boundary. Every mutation rechecks session, resource, membership, role, ban, policy, input and rate limit.

ru: Атомарная передача ownership с немедленным обновлением прав, audit entry и system message.
Назначение/снятие moderators, remove, ban, unban и ban list.
Invites с expiry, usage limit, revoke и atomic last-use handling.
Join requests, read-only, slow mode, announcement/pre-approval и media restrictions.
Administrative audit и immutable system messages.
en: Atomic ownership transfer with immediate permission update, audit entry and system message.
Moderator assignment/removal, remove, ban, unban and ban list.
Invites with expiry, usage limit, revocation and atomic last-use handling.
Join requests, read-only, slow mode, announcement/pre-approval and media restrictions.
Administrative audit and immutable system messages.

description.ru: Validated legacy uploads и encrypted secure media.
description.en: Validated legacy uploads and encrypted secure media.

ru: Server проверяет actual size, SHA-256 и фактический MIME, а не client extension/header.
Safe filename, quotas, cancellation, retry и cleanup temporary state.
Executable/dangerous formats блокируются; повреждённые images отображаются fail-safe.
en: The Server verifies actual size, SHA-256 and detected MIME rather than client extension/header.
Safe filename, quotas, cancellation, retry and temporary-state cleanup.
Executable/dangerous formats are blocked; damaged images render fail-safe.

ru: Client создаёт random AES-256-GCM key/IV и связывает AAD с conversation, attachment ID и kind.
Server хранит application/octet-stream ciphertext и проверяет exact size/hash.
Pending attachment недоступен до one-time atomic claim сообщением.
Private descriptor с filename/MIME/key/duration передаётся внутри MLS content.
Recipient локально проверяет и decrypts preview/playback/download.
en: The Client creates a random AES-256-GCM key/IV and binds AAD to conversation, attachment ID and kind.
The Server stores application/octet-stream ciphertext and verifies exact size/hash.
A pending attachment is unavailable until a one-time atomic message claim.
The private filename/MIME/key/duration descriptor travels inside MLS content.
The recipient verifies and decrypts preview/playback/download locally.

text.ru: Если запрещён любой class files/images/voice, полный opaque path блокируется сервером.
text.en: If any files/images/voice class is disabled, the complete opaque path is blocked by the Server.

description.ru: Device identity, KeyPackages, group epochs, recovery и ciphertext-only delivery.
description.en: Device identity, KeyPackages, group epochs, recovery and ciphertext-only delivery.

ru: Client создаёт distinct non-extractable Ed25519 identity и MLS signature keys.
Registration доказывает possession и связывает BasicCredential с {userId, deviceId}.
Первое устройство получает bootstrap verification; следующие требуют signed approval.
Verification/revocation используют отдельные one-time challenges.
Revocation немедленно disconnects socket и очищает local Trust/MLS state.
en: The Client creates distinct non-extractable Ed25519 identity and MLS signature keys.
Registration proves possession and binds BasicCredential to {userId, deviceId}.
The first device receives bootstrap verification; later devices require signed approval.
Verification and revocation use separate one-time challenges.
Revocation immediately disconnects the socket and clears local Trust/MLS state.

text.ru: Фиксированный profile: MLS_128_DHKEMX25519_AES128GCM_SHA256_Ed25519. Server проверяет authenticated account/device, active verified membership, group scope, monotonic epoch, commit uniqueness и replay before persistence/delivery.
text.en: Fixed profile: MLS_128_DHKEMX25519_AES128GCM_SHA256_Ed25519. The Server verifies authenticated account/device, active verified membership, group scope, monotonic epoch, commit uniqueness and replay before persistence/delivery.

text.ru: После MLS activation legacy send/edit/forward/draft/scheduled/poll/bot/upload paths отклоняют plaintext. Потеря private state даёт explicit error, а не downgrade.
text.en: After MLS activation, legacy send/edit/forward/draft/scheduled/poll/bot/upload paths reject plaintext. Private-state loss produces an explicit error, never a downgrade.

ru: Pending verified device запрашивает scoped Welcome; Server уведомляет только active verified group devices.
Active member создаёт RFC 9420 commit/Welcome; pending device выполняет bounded one-time claim.
Client recovery проверяет exact scope, contiguous epochs, SHA-256 commit hashes, duplicates и public-state chain.
en: A pending verified device requests a scoped Welcome; the Server notifies only active verified group devices.
An active member creates an RFC 9420 commit/Welcome; the pending device performs a bounded one-time claim.
Client recovery verifies exact scope, contiguous epochs, SHA-256 commit hashes, duplicates and the public-state chain.

description.ru: Cloud Identity, Plus, Impulse ledger, goals и signed entitlements.
description.en: Cloud Identity, Plus, Impulse ledger, goals and signed entitlements.

ru: Cloud Identity: email verification, MFA и OAuth 2.1 Authorization Code + PKCE.
Immutable double-entry Impulse ledger, receipts, provider reconciliation и signed production entitlements.
Local Server не создаёт authoritative production entitlement и не получает card/KYC/password/MFA secrets.
Core messaging продолжает работать без Cloud login.
en: Cloud Identity: email verification, MFA and OAuth 2.1 Authorization Code + PKCE.
Immutable double-entry Impulse ledger, receipts, provider reconciliation and signed production entitlements.
Local Server cannot create authoritative production entitlements and does not receive card/KYC/password/MFA secrets.
Core messaging continues without Cloud login.

text.ru: Checkout return URL не подтверждает оплату. Success возможен только после verified webhook/reconciliation; idempotency предотвращает duplicate credit.
text.en: A checkout return URL does not confirm payment. Success requires a verified webhook/reconciliation; idempotency prevents duplicate credit.

ru: Paid benefits не выдают owner/moderator и не обходят bans, room policies, retention или audit.
Owner transfer сохраняет entitlements и разделяет old/new creator revenue.
Sandbox не становится production authority.
en: Paid benefits never grant owner/moderator or bypass bans, room policies, retention or audit.
Ownership transfer preserves entitlements and separates old/new creator revenue.
Sandbox never becomes production authority.
